action.reasoning: Observation: 3-model ConvNeXt ensemble at 0.7998 confirmed. Adding more ConvNeXt models doesn't help. Analysis: Need a truly diverse model to add to ensemble. ConvNeXt at 224 with mixup+LS+combined data 4 epochs is the recipe. Different architectures (ResNet50, CLIP) so far hurt. Maybe try a ConvNeXt at higher resolution (288 or 256) - genuine diversity from input scale. With 9 iterations & 4.36h left, I can train 1-2 more models. Decision: Train ConvNeXt-Tiny at higher resolution 256 with same recipe to add diversity to ensemble. If it beats individual quality, add to ensemble.
